description: A request to modify existing configurations, workflows, or system settings to better suit evolving business requirements. This could include adding new modules, altering reporting formats, or updating system integrations.
name: Change Request

description: A report of a fault or error in the system, software, or integrated devices that disrupts normal operations. This could involve bugs in the IQ Retail software or issues with integrated hardware.
name: Defect

description: An on-site visit request by a technician to resolve hardware issues or provide direct support for critical software or network problems. This is typically used for issues that cannot be resolved remotely.
name: Call Out

description: A request for assistance with ongoing maintenance, configuration, or setup of the IQ Retail system. This includes inquiries about system usage, troubleshooting software issues, or guidance on specific features.
name: Service Request
